occupation: Out Of Home Media Acquisition and Marketing at Pioneer Publicity Corporation Pvt.Ltd.
headline: Out Of Home Media Specialist

experiences.title: Out Of Home Media Acquisition and Marketing
experiences.description: I was tapped for directing the service operations for major multinational OOH media agencies such as Kinetic (Division of WPP Group), Milestone, Posterscope, (Dentsu Ageis Network), Publicis, Havas Media & DDM Mudra, National agencies such as Madison, Outdoor Advertising Professional, Laqshya Solutions, OAP and Direct Private Sector clients and Public Sector Units in the field of Banking, Insurance and Telecommunication (BSNL) etc. I formulated corporate strategic business plans/roadmaps to tackle key business challenges. I set up a new branch and recruited high performance team members for managing the marketing, finance, operations function. I have consistently mentored the Branch Head across Business Development, Revenue Projection, Business Tracking, Lead Generation, Lead Conversion, Client Retention and Credit Control. Select accomplishments of this role include: •	Acquired sole rights tender from Pune Mahanagar Pariwahan Mahamandal Ltd., Central Railway- Byculla Hoarding Cluster, Airport Authority of India & Maharashtra State Road Development Authority to mention few. •	Improved reporting formats, ensured NIL outstanding aging and elevated market share by 10% across Pune, Pimpri-Chinchwad Municipal Corporation. •	Delivered operational excellence through various strategic implementations and ensured 70% client retention Year on Year •	Received Zonal Media Owner (West) Award for 3 years consistently at Outdoor Asia Convention in 2014, 2015, 2016

experiences.title: Head Of Sales Marketing and Out Of Home Media Acquisation
experiences.description: As Head Of Sales Marketing and Out Of Home Media Acquisition , I was responsible for directing the operations for OOH media in 7 cities across 6 states including Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, Jaipur, Indore, Bengaluru and Amritsar. By structuring & implementing BTL activities, I increased brand visibility of the client’s company. I strategized operational plans for the agency, headed branch operations for Mumbai, Indore & Pune & delivered a 3 fold growth for Out Of Media in 4 years. Being a pivotal member for branch set-up activities in Jaipur, I headed various operational functions and was able to deliver a profit of 50%

education.degree_name: Bachelors Of Journalism and Mass Communication
education.school: School Of Journalism and Mass Communication, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidhyala, Indore
St. Joseph Convent Senior Secondary School, Ratlam (Madhya Pradesh)
